name: Fig-Dessert Bites
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover figs with boiling water for 10 minutes; drain and dry between towels.
2. With scissors, cut the marshmallows into bite-sized pieces.
3. Mix the chopped nuts (walnuts or pecans) and sweet cooking (or butter) in a bowl.
4. Combine all ingredients and shape into small bites.
